title: Invoice Approval Automation
description: 3-way match, duplicate detection, GL coding, and auto-approval under $5K. Escalates to finance team for exceptions.
author: PAI Studio Team

title: Employee Onboarding Automation
description: End-to-end onboarding: account provisioning, equipment requests, buddy assignment, and 30/60/90 day check-ins.
author: PAI Studio Team

title: Contract Review & Redline
description: AI-powered contract analysis with risk flagging, clause extraction, redline generation, and approval routing.
author: PAI Studio Team

title: IT Support Triage & Resolution
description: Auto-categorise tickets, run known-fix playbooks, escalate to L2 only when needed. Integrates with ServiceNow and Jira.
author: PAI Studio Team

title: Sales Quote Generation
description: Qualify opportunity, pull pricing, generate proposal deck, run approval for non-standard discounts, and send to prospect.
author: PAI Studio Team

title: PDF → Obsidian Knowledge Base
description: Extract key insights, decisions, and action items from PDFs. Auto-tag and route to the right Obsidian vault folder.
author: PAI Studio Team

title: Vendor Onboarding & Compliance
description: Collect W-9/W-8, run sanctions screening, verify insurance certificates, set up in ERP, and notify procurement team.
author: finops-wizard

title: Content Publishing Pipeline
description: Draft → SEO review → design assets → multi-channel publish (blog, LinkedIn, newsletter). Auto-schedules based on editorial calendar.
author: marketing-mcp

title: Email Triage & Response Routing
description: AI classifies every inbound email, drafts on-brand replies, logs CRM tickets, auto-sends routine responses, escalates complaints and high-value inquiries to humans. Includes daily SLA digest.
author: PAI Studio Team
